idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for sudden appliance breakdowns signals discretionary sector rebound

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair keywords

behavior: A sharp weekly increase in searches related to emergency appliance repairs often precedes increased consumer spending on home services and replacements.

market_impact.rationale: Discretionary retailers and home improvement benefit as consumers rush to replace or fix broken appliances.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when weekly Google Trends for appliance breakdown-related terms rises over 20% from the prior week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search volume returns to baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends data for appliance repair spikes frequently during seasonal appliance wear periods.

idea: USGS earthquake frequency surge signals short-term disruption recovery bounce in industrials
behavior: A sudden increase in moderate earthquake occurrences correlates with temporary supply chain and infrastructure disruptions followed by rebound construction and industrial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial companies often benefit from increased repair and rebuilding efforts following seismic events.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI when daily count of magnitude 4+ earthquakes in US rises 50% above 14-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when earthquake counts revert to normal

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake swarms and clusters happen multiple times annually, triggering local industrial activity bursts.

idea: Weekly jump in Google Trends for ‘job quitting’ searches signals labor market tightness benefiting financial sector

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for job quitting and resignations

behavior: Increased interest in quitting jobs indicates labor market tightness and wage inflation expectations, often followed by increased borrowing and financial activity.

market_impact.rationale: Banks and financial companies benefit from higher loan demand and rising interest rate environments tied to strong labor markets.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLF when weekly Google Trends for job quitting rises 15%+ over previous week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or when search interest declines below 5% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market sentiment shifts reflected in searches happen frequently, especially near seasonal cycles.

idea: Weekly spike in freight container volumes at East Coast ports signals industrial sector strength

data.source: Port container volume weekly data for East Coast major ports

behavior: A sudden increase in container volumes indicates rising import/export activity feeding industrial production and supply chain demand.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial companies benefit from increased goods movement and supply chain activity.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI when weekly East Coast container volume rises 10%+ over 3-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if volume drops below 3-week average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Port volume data has weekly seasonality and frequent volume surges tied to shipping cycles.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 10 trading days or when trend falls below 10% above baseline
